title: Clear Trial Vaults
description: Transparent Trial Vaults Easily see items inside Trial Chamber vaults.
body:
## 📖 Description

Tired of struggling to see what’s inside Trial Chamber vaults?
This resource pack completely **removes the bulky overlay** and makes vaults **transparent**, so you can instantly spot loot without guessing.

Whether you’re speedrunning, farming resources, or just exploring, this pack gives you a **clear advantage** by letting you see items easily.

### ✨ Features

* 🪟 **Transparent Vaults** – No more obstructive textures
* 👁️ **Instant Visibility** – Clearly see items stored inside vaults
* ⚡ **Lightweight** – Zero performance drops, FPS-friendly
* 🎨 **Vanilla Friendly** – Keeps the original Minecraft style, only modifies vaults
* 🔄 **Compatible** – Works with most packs (as long as they don’t change vault textures)

### 🧩 Compatibility

* Minecraft **1.20.5 → 1.21.5**
* Tested on both **Singleplayer** and **Multiplayer**
* Safe for servers (visual-only resource pack, no unfair advantage beyond clarity)

### 🎯 Why use this pack?

Vaults are an exciting part of Trial Chambers, but sometimes the default texture makes it hard to notice what’s inside. With this pack, you’ll:

* Loot faster
* Avoid wasting time on unwanted vaults
* Get a smoother dungeon experience

👤 **Made by:** ThunderDeath
